notes: Solid Pong implementation with AI, sound, trail effects, and proper collision detection, but the ball collision logic has edge-case issues (ball can clip through paddles at high speed) and the AI prediction offset makes it occasionally too easy or erratic.
Excellent visual polish and game feel, but the AI fails to predict the ball's trajectory on serves directed at it, leading to free points.
Core Pong loop, scoring, AI, pause, and match flow are implemented well, but the serve state hides the ball and there are a few polish/gameplay quirks that prevent a higher score.
